title: sonerila affinis var. rostrata
intro: Sonerila affinis var. rostrata, also known as the Indian sonerila, is a plant species belonging to the Sonerila genus, native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Sonerila affinis var. rostrata is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction by boiling the plant's leaves and roots in water, or as a powder by drying and grinding the plant material.
